name: 14" Privet Artificial Plant - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Cement Pot, Indoor/Outdoor, Tabletop Decor
description:
Add leafy greens to your indoor living space with this Privet Artificial Plant from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This potted arrangement showcases green privet plant faux foliage to bring a touch of natural charm to your space. The artificial construction requires no maintenance and stays fresh at all times, while the distressed gray cement pot pairs well with most decors, and allows for easy display. Just place it on the mantel, console or sideboard along with other potted plants for a fresh, welcoming look.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
